## Files Added or Updated

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Added JSON Schema file to `auto-gen/schema-json/`
- [ ] Added metadata row to `auto-gen/schema-metadata.csv`
- [ ] Ran `python auto-gen/generate_schema_pages.py`
- [ ] Generated `schemas/<domain_slug>/<slug>/index.html`
- [ ] Generated `schemas/<domain_slug>/<slug>/master-schema.json`

---

## Validation Checklist

<!-- Please confirm that the generated page and files were inspected before submitting. -->

- [ ] JSON file is valid
- [ ] Metadata row is complete
- [ ] Generated page displays correctly
- [ ] Download link to `master-schema.json` works
- [ ] ORKG link works, if provided

---

Reviewer Notes

Schema contributions are expected to:

- Represent a clearly defined scientific process.
- Follow the folder structure `schemas/<domain_slug>/<slug>/`.
- Produce a final `master-schema.json`.
- Render correctly on the website.
- Include an ORKG template URL when available.

Thank you for helping build an open collection of reusable scientific process schemas!
